//: Copy to .sentinel-shield/accepted-risks.json. Only APPROVED, unexpired, owner-bound records suppress, and only for suppressible gates (unsafe_docker, medium_vulnerabilities). secrets/expired_exceptions/missing_release_evidence are NEVER suppressed. Suppression is reported and the raw count is preserved (not zeroed). A Markdown draft alone does NOT suppress anything.
//scope: v0.1.8+: records are FINDING-SCOPED by default — set rule_id + files to suppress only matching findings (implemented for unsafe_docker against reports/raw/hadolint.json). Broad gate-wide suppression requires explicit "scope":"gate" and is discouraged. A record with neither scope nor rule_id/files is ambiguous and does NOT suppress.

risks.reason: Alpine apk pinning is brittle for the Chromium/headless-browser stack; reviewed as a hygiene risk, not an exploitable CVE.
risks.mitigation: Base images are digest-pinned; images are scanned by Trivy; browser-stack split planned. Revisit before expiry.

risks.reason: EXAMPLE ONLY of a BROAD (scope:gate) suppression — discouraged. Suppresses the WHOLE medium_vulnerabilities gate. Prefer finding-scoped records. Status 'pending' so this example never suppresses.
risks.mitigation: Replace with finding-scoped records once per-finding identifiers are available.
